arts.ttl: Man City and Real Madrid meet in Champions League with one of Europe's giants facing elimination
arts.sum: “We’ve not been consistent, when what’s defined the team over the last decade has been we are an incredible machine every three days, otherwise we cannot win six Premier Leagues in seven years or win the incredible trophies we have won,” he said. Guardiola said he did not know what to expect from his team after a troubled season has left it in fifth place in the Premier League, 15 points behind leader Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star could face prison over explicit video of minor
arts.sum: If the victim did not consent to the recording (which she stated she didn’t), Article 197.1 of the Criminal Code stipulates a prison sentence of one to four years and paying a fine for 12 to 24 months for the person who recorded the video . The four players could face potential prison sentences ranging from one to five years for their alleged involvement in the case, as outlined in Article 197 of Spain’s Criminal Code.

arts.ttl: Five moments that have defined Manchester City and Real Madrid’s rivalry
arts.sum: For the fourth successive season, Manchester City are preparing to face Real Madrid in the Champions League’s knockout rounds. City’s emergence as a European force over the last decade has seen the Blues become real rivals to Real Madrid – the Champions League’s kings.
